item.description: Hello! My name is Kevin and I am a senior at Cal Poly Pomona studying mathematics. Particularly, my field of interest is in data science. The reason why I want to pursue data science is that I find that being a data detective is quite fun and challenging. I define a data detective to be just like those detectives in crime shows: gathering evidence (data), using said evidence to make a stance, and tell a story for everyone to listen and understand.

Data Fest 2019 Picture with the Judges at DataFest! For datafest 2019, my team (unDATAble) and I were given a large data set on the Canadian Women Rugby Sevens team and were tasked to maximize the players performance. We used R and Tableau to find insights and visuals for our presentation. At the end of the competition, we gave a small presentation and were awarded and medaled Best Use of Data Forensics out of 30 teams!
I can be reached at katsoi@cpp.edu
